name: GTM AI Workflow
description: Long-running GTM AI service that finds and researches target accounts, drafts personalized outreach, tracks replies, updates a local CSV CRM, recommends next actions, and feeds market insight back to product and marketing.

contract.summary: Long-running GTM AI service that finds and researches target accounts, drafts personalized outreach, tracks replies, updates a local CSV CRM, recommends next actions, and feeds market insight back to product and marketing.
users: Growth, sales, RevOps, product marketing, and founder-led GTM teams.

initial_customer_list.description: Optional initial target-account or customer list with fields such as name, email, title, company, profile, tags, and source signals.

example.name: Riley Chen
example.title: VP Revenue Operations
example.profile: Owns CRM hygiene and pipeline reporting.

crm_csv_folder.description: Local folder where crm.csv and market_insights.csv are written and updated during the workflow.

test_mode_email.description: Optional internal test recipient. When set, outbound email is sent only to this address while the CRM records the real target account separately.

steps.label: Load Inputs
steps.goal: Resolve the selected input adapter and record input provenance.

steps.label: Run Workflow
steps.goal: Run the long-lived GTM account research, outreach, response tracking, CRM CSV, and insight feedback loop.

steps.label: Write Final Artifact
steps.goal: Persist result.json, final_artifact.json, events, logs, and optional output-skill fan-out records.

workers.role: Resolve mock, JSON, file, or env_json inputs

customer.name: Riley Chen
customer.profile: Revenue operations leader at a 220-person SaaS company. Likely owns CRM hygiene, handoff quality, and pipeline reporting while sales experiments with AI-written outbound.
customer.title: VP Revenue Operations

ingress.goal: Start a qualified conversation and capture market signal for product and marketing.
ingress.objective: Research the account, identify likely GTM pain, draft personalized outreach, and update the local CSV CRM.
ingress.rationale: GTM AI Workflow selected this target account from supplied seed signals and ICP fit.

recent_activities.summary: Research signal: hiring sales operations roles while reps test AI outbound, suggesting CRM hygiene and handoff risk.
Likely pain: account research and reply summaries are not consistently captured in the CRM.

ingress.success_metric: Qualified reply, next action, and CRM CSV update
ingress.why_now: The account has a supplied signal that suggests a GTM learning-loop problem is timely.

customer.name: Mina Patel
customer.profile: Product marketing leader preparing a category narrative refresh. Likely needs better feedback from sales conversations and outbound replies.
customer.title: Head of Product Marketing

ingress.goal: Start a qualified conversation and capture market signal for product and marketing.
ingress.objective: Research the account, identify likely GTM pain, draft personalized outreach, and update the local CSV CRM.
ingress.rationale: GTM AI Workflow selected this target account from supplied seed signals and ICP fit.

recent_activities.summary: Research signal: product marketing is refreshing category positioning and needs structured market feedback from sales conversations.

ingress.success_metric: Qualified reply, next action, and CRM CSV update
ingress.why_now: The account has a supplied signal that suggests a GTM learning-loop problem is timely.

customer.name: Alex Morgan
customer.profile: Founder-led B2B company testing repeatable outbound. Likely wants more learning from each conversation before hiring a larger GTM team.
customer.title: Co-founder and CEO

ingress.goal: Start a qualified conversation and capture market signal for product and marketing.
ingress.objective: Research the account, identify likely GTM pain, draft personalized outreach, and update the local CSV CRM.
ingress.primary_offer: AI account research and outreach pilot
ingress.rationale: GTM AI Workflow selected this target account from supplied seed signals and ICP fit.

recent_activities.summary: Research signal: founder-led sales motion needs a lightweight loop from target hypothesis to reply insight.

ingress.success_metric: Qualified reply, next action, and CRM CSV update
ingress.why_now: The account has a supplied signal that suggests a GTM learning-loop problem is timely.

workers.role: Write result and final artifact to the local run store

primary.role: Campaign planner, copywriter, policy checker, delivery executor, inbox responder.

metadata.customizable_for: Account-based outbound, founder-led sales, RevOps CRM hygiene, product marketing feedback loops, and sales-assist workflows.
metadata.description: Long-running GTM AI service that finds and researches target accounts, drafts personalized outreach, tracks replies, updates a local CSV CRM, recommends next actions, and feeds market insight back to product and marketing.

human_control.reason: The workflow may surface notable findings for review but does not apply irreversible actions by itself.

fields.description: Run mode used for mock, test, or real-adapter execution.
fields.label: Run mode

fields.description: Input source adapter. Mock is safe for demos; real inputs use json, file, env_json, streams, or connector profiles.
fields.label: Input adapter

fields.description: Local run-store root for logs, events, inputs, outputs, and final artifacts.
fields.label: Run-store root

fields.description: Whether this blueprint disables human control, emits notice-only events, or requires approval for high-impact actions.
fields.label: Human control mode

fields.description: Whether the shared run-store dashboard should be available for this run.
fields.label: Web UI

fields.description: LLM endpoint used by LLM-backed agents.
fields.label: LLM API base

fields.description: LLM model used by LLM-backed agents.
fields.label: LLM model

input_contract.description: Long-running GTM AI service that finds and researches target accounts, drafts personalized outreach, tracks replies, updates a local CSV CRM, recommends next actions, and feeds market insight back to product and marketing.

required_inputs.name: crm_csv_folder
required_inputs.description: Local folder where crm.csv and market_insights.csv are written.

optional_inputs.name: initial_customer_list
optional_inputs.description: Optional initial target account list with name, email, title, company, profile, and signals.

optional_inputs.name: test_mode_email
optional_inputs.description: Optional internal recipient for safe test sends.

artifacts.description: Stable run-store files and domain-specific outputs.

human.description: Sparse human collaboration notices, input requests, and responses.

input_skills.description: Connector-backed or reusable skill-backed input sources.

inputs.description: Resolved runtime inputs and adapter provenance.

logs.description: Runtime stdout/stderr and explicit log artifacts.

output_skills.description: Optional fan-out destinations after local run-store writes.

outputs.description: Primary result and final user-facing artifact.

resources.description: Blueprint-scoped CPU, GPU, memory, and LLM token usage samples.

streams.description: Named data or event streams exposed by the blueprint.

metadata.llm_agent_role: Campaign planner, copywriter, policy checker, delivery executor, inbox responder.
metadata.name: GTM AI Workflow
metadata.output: Prepared emails, sent-event logs, reply handling events, and campaign summaries.

final_artifact.description: The durable user-facing artifact should summarize the result, recommendation, confidence, evidence, next steps, and source references.

output_contract.stdout: single JSON object, event envelope, or bundle path

metadata.problem_solved: GTM teams need a learning loop from target-account signal to outreach, response, CRM state, product insight, and sharper positioning.

quick_test.description: Use generated quick-test bundles when available; fixed blueprints use local dry-run/mock provider environment variables and deterministic sample inputs.

metadata.simulation_type: Lifecycle campaign loop with inbox and delivery state.

standard.execution_model: load_metadata -> resolve_config -> load_inputs -> start_run_store -> observe_simulation_state -> call_llm_agent -> evaluate_workflow_state -> route_by_context -> request_human_input -> apply_decision_to_simulation -> emit_events -> write_final_artifact -> fan_out_output_skills

metadata.target_user: Growth, sales, RevOps, product marketing, and founder-led GTM teams.

web_ui.description: Shared blueprint support dashboard rendered from local run-store events and artifacts.

metadata.target_users: Growth, sales, RevOps, product marketing, and founder-led GTM teams.
